creator: kamikaze@bsdforen.de
text:
Request reopening, not fixed!

The #if definition in the committed patch is wrong, 8.2 is among
the affected versions.

Similarly I'd expect 7.4 to be affected, too.

> uname -a
FreeBSD mobileKamikaze.norad 8.2-PRERELEASE FreeBSD 8.2-PRERELEASE #0: Tue Feb  8 15:38:58 CET 2011     root@mobileKamikaze.norad:/usr/obj/HP6510b-8/amd64/usr/src/sys/HP6510b-8  amd64

Changing the comparison to < 803000 fixes the problem for me.

Regards

-- 
A: Because it fouls the order in which people normally read text.
Q: Why is top-posting such a bad thing?
A: Top-posting.
Q: What is the most annoying thing on usenet and in e-mail?
